subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-08-14 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: The difference between me and the rest is that I wish the welfare of the people for their own sake, and without any ulterior motive.
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @spiritual transformation, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence, @the golden rule; regard for one's neighbor; doing unto others, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
